name: EuiFlexGrid
description: Responsive grid layout that wraps children into equal-width columns.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

direction.description:
Flex layouts default to left-right then top-down (`row`).
Change this prop to `column` to create a top-down then left-right display.

responsive.description: Will display each item at full-width on smaller screens

example: <EuiFlexGrid component="div" alignItems="stretch" direction="row" columns={1} gutterSize="l" responsive />
